name: saveondrive
description: Root shim so Render (or any host) can build and run the backend from the repo root, even when the service Root Directory is not set to `backend`.

scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npx prisma db push && (npm run seed || echo 'seed skipped') && node dist/server.js
